bead.title: Benchmark: axon backend vs JSONL on 1100-bead archive
bead.description: Add a benchmark that exercises ready/blocked/show queue ops on a 1100-bead corpus (current archive scale) for both jsonl and axon backends. Capture wall-time and allocs. Report parity-or-better as the axon adoption gate per parent AC6. Output benchmark results into the per-attempt evidence dir.
bead.acceptance: 1. Benchmark file under cli/internal/bead/ exercises ready/blocked/show on 1100-bead corpus. 2. Runs against both jsonl and axon backends. 3. Results document parity-or-better for axon vs jsonl. 4. Benchmark is reproducible via go test -bench.
